question_text: Which of the following best describes what a wavelength is?

options.label: A
options.text: The distance between one point on a wave and the next identical point

options.label: B
options.text: The height of a wave from the middle to the top

options.label: C
options.text: The time it takes for one complete wave to pass a point

options.label: D
options.text: The speed at which a wave travels through space

explanation: Wavelength is the distance between one point on a wave and the next identical point, such as from one peak to the next peak. It is usually measured in metres.
